channel.title: Posts on Math Explorer
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Math Explorer

item.title: Class 6 Chapter 1: Patterns in Mathematics
item.description: An interactive, visually stunning guide to Chapter 1 of Class 6 Math: discovering patterns in numbers, shapes, and their relations.

item.title: Mastering Fractions, Decimals, and Percentages
item.description: Understand how to convert between fractions, decimals, and percentages easily with step-by-step shortcuts.

item.title: The Pythagorean Theorem: Formula, Proof & Practical Examples
item.description: Learn how the square of the hypotenuse equals the sum of squares of the other two sides in a right-angled triangle.

item.title: Understanding Variables: An Introduction to Algebra for Class 6+
item.description: What are variables, constants, and equations? A beginner-friendly guide to stepping into the world of Algebra.
